calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Union County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Monday, August 25, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Union County Public Schools in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, June 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are included?
calendarFaqs.a: Students attend 175 instructional days. Semester 1 contains 86 instructional days and Semester 2 contains 89 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: How many staff calendar days are scheduled?
calendarFaqs.a: The calendar includes 215 calendar days for staff.
Yes. October 2, 2025 (Elementary) and January 16, 2026 (Secondary) are designated required make-up days. Saturdays and/or extended school days may also be used if necessary.
Spring Break runs from Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Why 175 Days?
yearNumbers.detail: UCPS organizes the student calendar around state instructional requirements while separating student attendance dates from staff-only calendar rules.

yearNumbers.label: Staff Calendar Length
yearNumbers.detail: The staff calendar is broader than the student calendar, so some weekdays are no-school days for families but still matter for district operations.

yearNumbers.label: Semester 1
yearNumbers.detail: The first semester carries students from the late-August start through the winter recess and early-January transition.

yearNumbers.label: Semester 2
yearNumbers.detail: The second semester includes spring testing, Spring Break, Memorial Day, graduations, and the year-end closeout window.

calendarNotes: Union County Public Schools 2025-2026 Traditional Academic Calendar. Students attend 175 instructional days with 86 days in Semester 1 and 89 days in Semester 2. Staff follow a 215-day calendar. Students do not attend school on holidays, teacher workdays, district professional development days, and major breaks. The calendar includes designated make-up days for Elementary (October 2, 2025) and Secondary (January 16, 2026). Additional make-up days may be scheduled by the superintendent if needed. The first day of school is August 25, 2025, and the last day of school is June 5, 2026.
